title: Delta — A single-page brief
description: Generic placeholder fixture exercising the lite minimal-brief primitive sequence (hero + paragraph + divider + paragraph).

sections.text: Some sites need almost nothing. A title, two paragraphs, and a clean rule between them.

The lite surface treats minimal sites as a first-class case rather than a degraded one. No mandatory hero photo, no mandatory feature grid, no mandatory CTA. Build only what the content actually requires.
